div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 313px; height: 1px; padding-top: 327px; margin-left: 767px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; max-height: 116px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.p:
Provides wrappers required to use core with other languages/platform:
- core-wasm for WebAssembly
- core-jni for Java/Kotlin

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 313px; height: 1px; padding-top: 207px; margin-left: 767px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; max-height: 116px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.p:
Access stored data (thread lists, configuration, user created files)
- From the filesystem for the desktop application
- From a database for the web (and android) application
